scripts.build: npm run build -w @hinterview/shared && npm run build -w @hinterview/server && npm run build -w @hinterview/renderer && npm run build -w @hinterview/desktop
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n shared,server,renderer,desktop:watch,desktop -c auto "npm run watch -w @hinterview/shared" "npm run dev -w @hinterview/server" "npm run dev -w @hinterview/renderer" "npm run watch -w @hinterview/desktop" "wait-on packages/shared/dist/index.js apps/desktop/dist/main.js tcp:5173 tcp:8787 && npm run start -w @hinterview/desktop"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n shared,server,renderer -c auto "npm run watch -w @hinterview/shared" "npm run dev -w @hinterview/server" "npm run dev -w @hinterview/renderer"
